name: GenAI Lab 6 — RAG Pipeline
postCreateCommand: pip install --no-cache-dir numpy matplotlib jupyter requests pytest nbformat sentence-transformers chromadb && curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh
postStartCommand: nohup ollama serve > /tmp/ollama.log 2>&1 & sleep 8 && ollama pull llama3.2:3b &
